polly: You can generate voice-over from a script via Amazon Polly.

elevenlabs.speaker: Gigi
elevenlabs.caption: You can alternatively generate voice-over using ElevenLabs.

captions: You can generate captions from your voice-over script.
allosaurus: You can generate lip-sync via Allosaurus.
rhubarb: You can also generate lip-sync via Rhubarb.
multi: You can also have captions with multiple speakers.

multi.speaker: Zach
multi.caption: Just provide an array of captions.

multi.speaker: Brooke
multi.caption: And be sure to include a speaker with each caption.
